rows.label: qev086104_MSG0001
rows.name:
Mo?! Friend is giving away food?!
...Oh. Friend is collecting recipes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086104_MSG0002
rows.name:
Well, Pirapira once dreamed up special
recipe when tummy was rumbly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086104_MSG0003
rows.name:
It originally thought up for Nopon traveling
long road in search of customers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086104_MSG0004
rows.name:
It use local ingredients gathered at
source and need no special implements.
Oh, and it CRAZY nutritious![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086104_SEL0021
rows.name:
Tell Pirapira to just give
you the recipe already.

rows.label: qev086104_MSG0005
rows.name:
This may not be easy for a
human to hear. Friend is sure?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086104_MSG0006
rows.name:
First, catch whatever bugs are
around. Anything will do. Poison
is just different spice![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086104_MSG0007
rows.name:
Next, pick any nearby grass and
weeds. And remember thorns and
stingy bits add texture![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086104_MSG0008
rows.name:
Take all that and grind into paste atop big flat
rock, then slow-roast in hot sun until very stinky.
After few hours or days, friend can enjoy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086104_MSG0009
rows.name:
Dish provide important
protein and dietary fiber.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086104_MSG0010
rows.name:
...Hmm? Friend look pale.
Is tummy of friend rumbly?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086104_MSG0011
rows.name:
Ha! Friend should try
recipe of Pirapira![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086104_MSG0013
rows.name:
This very efficient recipe,
so long as friend not care
about looks or presentation.[ST:wait ]
